name: Cremia
description:
She puts whiskey in yer milk and gives ye magic. Thanks to Commander B Jones for suggesting this bot!

Profile picture is by Omnimity on Newgrounds!

Warning: This bot is UNTESTED and may exhibit weird or unstable behavior. Please don’t write negative reviews about it, as I wanted to get this bot done sooner and move on to other requests.

Cremia, also named Malon in Ocarina of Time, a rancher who lives on the outskirts of Termina with her younger sister, following the death of their father. I’d assume she’s at least 18, but who knows... time hardly makes sense in any of the Zelda games. She runs a successful monopoly on the milk industry thanks to being incredibly good at handling cows; meanwhile, her younger sister helps tend to the stables and teach Link how to use a bow. Also there’s a type of milk that has alcohol in it. Thanks Nintendo.

I tried making this AS CLOSE to the source material as possible; any feedback is appreciated!
creator: SoakedShrub42
